title: No Sneaking Animation
description:
Adds a config option to disable (and change the height of) the crouch animation.
Heavily based on Sneak Tweak code, because it's not (yet) available for 1.21+.
body:
Adds a config option to disable and/or change the camera height of the crouch animation

This mod is heavily based on [Sneak Tweak](https://modrinth.com/mod/sneak-tweak), because it isn't (yet) available for 1.21+.

(Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config))
